name: agent-docs
description: Agent skills for project documentation: scaffold an Astro 5 + Starlight docs site from an interview, generate portable SVG/PNG diagrams, and write house-style docs. Authored once in Claude-native form and emitted to Claude, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, and Gemini.
